Strictly Non-Public — Project Bamboo Lantern Term Sheet for a proposed strategic investment in Silver Lotus Retail JSC by Midori Capital VN LLC.
Transaction summary: 15.5% primary subscription and up to 34.5% secondary purchase from existing shareholders, targeting 50.0% post-closing ownership.
Listing and regulatory context: Issuer intends to pursue a 2027 listing on the Saigon Equity Exchange (SEE), subject to filings with the Viet Capital Markets Authority (VCMA); none of the information herein is public.
Consideration: Aggregate cash proceeds up to VND 1,200,000,000,000, with a price collar and a 24-month earn-out tied to audited EBITDA.
Embargo: No public communication or external diligence discussions before 27 July 2026, 17:00 ICT, absent written IR clearance from the Issuer.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Subscription Agreement, governed by Vietnamese law, including customary reps, warranties, and restrictive covenants.
MAC/MAE: Buyer may terminate upon a material adverse change; for clarity, seasonal Tet-related demand shifts, changes in VN GAAP, or general FX volatility shall not constitute a MAC/MAE.
Conditions precedent: VCMA acknowledgement, SEE pre-listing review, board approvals, key employee retention, and no breach of banking covenants at closing.
Key personnel: Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan (Head of Merchandising) to enter a 24-month non-compete and retention bonus plan; contact: lan.nguyen@silverlotus.example.vn; Zalo +84 981 001 112 (fictional).
Funding mechanics: subscription proceeds to VCMA-compliant escrow at An Khang Commercial Bank, Escrow Account A ending 7715, beneficiary Silver Lotus Retail JSC (fictional).
Board memo reference: Board memorandum dated 15 June 2026 outlines Bac Ninh distribution center expansion; memo is internal only and not for external circulation.
IR draft: preliminary investor-relations release (internal) contemplates FY2027 revenue guidance of VND 2,400bn and target EBITDA margin of 12%; not for distribution prior to SEE filing.
Research note: internal analysis references a VnPulse article from 2019 (public-source) that is stale and not relied upon for projections.
